orthrus_diffusion.snippet: from collections import Counter  def word_frequency(paragraph):     words = paragraph.lower().split()     return Counter(words)  paragraph = 'the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog the fox'  frequency = word_frequency(paragraph) for word, count in sorted(frequency.items()):     print(f'{word}: {count}')

orthrus_nodiff.snippet: from collections import Counter  def word_frequency(paragraph):     words = paragraph.lower().split()     return Counter(words)
